task: Provision, change, and deactivate user access by role, branch, and module across the rental platform.
frequency: as hires, moves, and terminations occur
tool_today: Admin console, IT ticket queue, permission matrix
decision_content: Decide the least-privilege access scope each user needs without breaking branch workflows or overexposing data.

task: Maintain branch hierarchy and visibility rules so local, regional, and headquarters users see the right slice of the operation.
frequency: as org structure or branch footprint changes
tool_today: Admin hierarchy settings, org chart, branch configuration
decision_content: Map users to the correct branch and region scopes while preserving leadership visibility and local data relevance.

task: Update billing models, pricing parameters, and dashboard settings to match current operating policy.
frequency: as pricing, billing, or reporting policies change
tool_today: RentalMan admin screens, change requests, test environment
decision_content: Judge whether a configuration change is safe, what branches it affects, and when it should be released.

task: Configure role-specific dashboards and report views so branch, regional, and executive users get the right information in the right format.
tool_today: Reporting module, dashboard builder, BI export tools
decision_content: Choose what each audience needs to see, what detail is too noisy, and when a view should become a standard report.

task: Monitor customer-portal integration health and investigate data-flow exceptions before customer self-service goes stale.
frequency: through the business day as sync exceptions appear
tool_today: Integration logs, portal admin screens, support queue
decision_content: Decide whether an issue is a transient sync delay, a configuration problem, or a vendor-level escalation that can affect customer-facing data.

task: Monitor logistics and mobile-app integrations so dispatch, field, and rental-system records remain aligned.
frequency: through the business day as transport or mobile exceptions appear
tool_today: Integration dashboard, logistics admin, alerting tools
decision_content: Judge whether a mismatch can wait for batch repair or threatens active dispatch and field execution right now.

task: Audit stale or re-keyed master data when branch workflows depend on outdated availability, contract, or customer records.
tool_today: Data quality reports, admin correction screens, branch follow-up email
decision_content: Prioritize which data defects are material enough to correct centrally and which belong back with branch users for cleanup.
